name: Mitsuhide Rouen
description: One of Zen's close Aides. He was first introduced to Zen when he was 17 by Zen's brother, the first prince, Izana. Mitsuhide is one with an outgoing and honest personality. He shares a close relationship with Zen and can often be seen having a friendly banter with each other. He was once described as 'protective' by Kiki, another close aide, towards Zen.
